title: CLAUDE.md
text: RXKCD R package (v2.0.0) provides access XKCD comics via XKCD JSON API. v1.x CRAN; v2.0.0 current development version. R CMD check passes clean (Status: OK) branch.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: shell:
code: # Load package during development devtools::load_all()  # Regenerate NAMESPACE and man/*.Rd from roxygen2 comments roxygen2::roxygenise()  # Run R CMD CHECK devtools::check()  # Build the package devtools::build()  # Rebuild pkgdown documentation site (outputs to docs/) pkgdown::build_site() R CMD build . R CMD check RXKCD_*.tar.gz

title: CLAUDE.md
text: source code lives single file: R/getXKCD.R. internal helper functions — three exported functions use httr, jsonlite, DBI, duckdb directly. Public API (3 exported functions): - getXKCD(, display, html, saveImg) — always hits live XKCD API; accepts "current", "random", comic number; returns list num, title, date, img, alt, link, transcript - updateConfig() — smart incremental sync: connects local DuckDB, determines comic IDs missing (skipping non-existent #404), downloads metadata, appends chunks 100 cap peak memory; rate-limited 0.05s per request - searchXKCD(query) — queries local DuckDB SQL ILIKE across title, alt, transcript fields; requires updateConfig() run first Local database: - Stored ~/.RXKCD/xkcd.duckdb (DuckDB, auto-created updateConfig()) - Schema: xkcd(num INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title, date, alt, img, transcript) - getXKCD() fully independent database; searchXKCD() updateConfig() use Note DuckDB read_only: Pass dbConnect(), duckdb() — duckdb(read_only=TRUE) defaults -memory DuckDB rejects read--memory databases. Correct pattern: DBI::dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(), dbdir = path, read_only = TRUE).

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Documentation written roxygen2 comments (#') R/getXKCD.R. editing, run roxygen2::roxygenise() regenerate NAMESPACE man/*.Rd. NAMESPACE file auto-generated — edit manually. .Rbuildignore excludes .claude/, CLAUDE.md, RXKCD_*.tar.gz built package.

title: RXKCD — XKCD Comics from R
text: Authors: Paolo Sonego, Mikko KorpelaLicense: GPL-2.0Version: 2.0.1Status: Stable

title: RXKCD — XKCD Comics from R
text: Visualize favorite XKCD comic strip directly R. Includes live archive searching full-text BM25 ranking semantic similarity search via local GloVe embeddings — powered local DuckDB cache, external API required.

title: RXKCD — XKCD Comics from R
text: CRAN version can retrieved : latest version (v2.0.1) can obtained via:

title: RXKCD — XKCD Comics from R
code: library(RXKCD)  # First run: downloads all comic metadata, builds FTS index and GloVe embeddings # Subsequent runs: only syncs new comics updateConfig()  # Fetch and display a comic getXKCD("current")       # latest comic getXKCD("random")        # random comic getXKCD(353)             # specific comic by number  # Keyword search with BM25 ranking (results ordered by relevance) searchXKCD("python") searchXKCD("significant")  # Semantic similarity search using GloVe embeddings similarXKCD("feeling lonely") similarXKCD("space exploration", n = 10)

title: Get XKCD comic — getXKCD
text: Fetches comic metadata image XKCD JSON API.

title: Get XKCD comic — getXKCD
code: getXKCD(which = "current", display = TRUE, html = FALSE, saveImg = FALSE)

title: Get XKCD comic — getXKCD
text: single string single numeric value. Specifies comic retrieve. Can `"current"` latest comic, `"random"` random comic, comic number. Optional. display single logical value. `TRUE`, comic image displayed R graphics device. Optional. html single logical value. `TRUE`, comic's URL opened default web browser. Optional. saveImg single logical value. `TRUE`, comic image saved file current working directory. Optional.

title: Get XKCD comic — getXKCD
text: list containing details XKCD comic (number, title, date, image URL, alt text, link, transcript). `html` `TRUE`, list returned invisibly. comic found connection fails, returns `NULL` invisibly. Errors occur `` invalid XKCD API reached attempting get random comic.

title: Search XKCD comics — searchXKCD
text: Searches local DuckDB cache using full-text search (BM25 ranking) across comic titles, alt text, transcripts. Results ranked relevance. Supports stemming (e.g., "running" matches "run") stopword removal. Run updateConfig() first populate database build search index.

title: Search XKCD comics — searchXKCD
text: query single string search comic titles, alt text, transcripts.

title: Search XKCD comics — searchXKCD
text: data frame containing matching XKCD comics columns num, date, title, alt, score (BM25 relevance), ordered relevance. matches found, empty data frame returned invisibly, message printed. function stop error local database search index found.

what: Find semantically similar XKCD comics — similarXKCD
title: Find semantically similar XKCD comics — similarXKCD
text: Uses pre-computed GloVe embeddings find comics semantically similar given query. Unlike searchXKCD(), matches keywords, function captures meaning (e.g., "feeling lonely" can match comics isolation even contain word "lonely"). Run updateConfig() first build embeddings.

title: Find semantically similar XKCD comics — similarXKCD
Find semantically similar XKCD comics — similarXKCD
text: query single string describing topic feeling search . n single integer specifying number results return. Defaults 5.

title: Find semantically similar XKCD comics — similarXKCD
text: data frame columns num, date, title, alt, similarity (cosine similarity score, 0-1), ordered similarity. similar comics found, empty data frame returned invisibly. function stop error embeddings built.

title: Update XKCD Database (Smart Sync) — updateConfig
text: Connects local DuckDB. Checks missing comics fetches full metadata (Title, Alt Text, Transcript) JSON API gaps.

title: Update XKCD Database (Smart Sync) — updateConfig
text: `TRUE`, invisibly, database successfully updated determined --date. function stop error connect `xkcd.com`.
